top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS events_attended, m.major_name AS major
FROM member mem
JOIN major m ON mem.link_to_major = m.major_id
JOIN attendance a ON mem.member_id = a.link_to_member
WHERE mem.first_name = 'Luisa' AND mem.last_name = 'Guidi';

SELECT COUNT(*) AS event_count, m.major_name
FROM member me
JOIN major m ON me.link_to_major = m.major_id
JOIN attendance a ON me.member_id = a.link_to_member
WHERE me.first_name = 'Luisa' AND me.last_name = 'Guidi';

SELECT COUNT(*) AS events_attended, m.major_name AS major
FROM member mem
JOIN major m ON mem.link_to_major = m.major_id
JOIN attendance a ON mem.member_id = a.link_to_member
WHERE mem.first_name = 'Luisa' AND mem.last_name = 'Guidi';

SELECT COUNT(*) AS events_attended, maj.major_name AS major
FROM member mem
JOIN major maj ON mem.link_to_major = maj.major_id
JOIN attendance att ON mem.member_id = att.link_to_member
WHERE mem.first_name = 'Luisa' AND mem.last_name = 'Guidi'
GROUP BY maj.major_name;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS event_count, m.major_name
FROM member me
JOIN major m ON me.link_to_major = m.major_id
JOIN attendance a ON me.member_id = a.link_to_member
WHERE me.first_name = 'Luisa' AND me.last_name = 'Guidi';

SELECT COUNT(*) AS events_attended, m.major_name AS major
FROM member mem
JOIN major m ON mem.link_to_major = m.major_id
JOIN attendance a ON mem.member_id = a.link_to_member
WHERE mem.first_name = 'Luisa' AND mem.last_name = 'Guidi';

SELECT COUNT(*) AS events_attended, maj.major_name AS major
FROM member mem
JOIN major maj ON mem.link_to_major = maj.major_id
JOIN attendance att ON mem.member_id = att.link_to_member
WHERE mem.first_name = 'Luisa' AND mem.last_name = 'Guidi'
GROUP BY maj.major_name;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_events, m.major_name
FROM member mem
JOIN major m ON mem.link_to_major = m.major_id
JOIN attendance a ON mem.member_id = a.link_to_member
WHERE mem.first_name = 'Luisa' AND mem.last_name = 'Guidi'
GROUP BY m.major_name;

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS events_attended, m.major_name AS major
FROM member mem
JOIN major m ON mem.link_to_major = m.major_id
JOIN attendance a ON mem.member_id = a.link_to_member
WHERE mem.first_name = 'Luisa' AND mem.last_name = 'Guidi';
